courageous, dirty, be averse to war and be poor.
74. If the Moon, Jupiter and Venus be in the 9th, one will be equal to a king and be a king.
75. If Jupiter, Saturn and the Moon be in the 9th, one will speak sweetly, be truthful, virtuous,
famous and skilful in all Shastras.
76. If Venus, the Moon and Saturn join in the 9th, one will be in agricultural profession, be
interested in women, will not indulge in sinful acts, will accomplish his objects (Kritakritya)
and be world-famous.
77. If Mars, Mercury and Jupiter join in the 9th, one will be splendourous, devoid of grief, be
learned, firm in his word, famous and be head of a zone.
78. If Mars, Mercury and Venus are conjunct in the 9th, one will head many provinces, or affairs,
be famous, honoured by the king, the fierce and be always zealous.
79.If Mars, Mercury and Saturn join in the 9th, one will be skilful in cheating others, will be highly
